raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The implementation of tenant preferences can help to prevent residential displacement.",
    "The SB 649 bill permits developers to prioritize tenants at the highest risk of displacement for affordable housing.",
    "Rising rents and development pressures threaten to displace thousands of households in California.",
    "The COVID-19 pandemic has intensified displacement pressures in the Bay Area and across California.",
    "Displacement contributes to increased greenhouse gas emissions due to longer commutes.",
    "The state currently lacks a policy supporting housing for tenants at risk of displacement.",
    "SB 649 aligns tenant preferences with Internal Revenue Code requirements for affordable housing projects.",
    "The legislation will empower local governments to implement tenant preference policies.",
    "The Anti-Displacement Tenant preference sets aside affordable apartments for low-income applicants in high-risk areas.",
    "The Neighborhood Tenant Preference increases the likelihood that low-income renters can remain in their neighborhoods."
  ]
}
```
